title: cardanthera avana
intro: Cardanthera avana, also known as Kanthari or Indian earthworm plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. The plant is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Cardanthera avana include its ability to treat various skin conditions, such as acne, eczema, and wounds, as well as its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and act as an antiseptic. In herbal preparations, Cardanthera avana is often used to make topical creams, ointments, and powders, which can be applied directly to the affected area to harness its medicinal properties.
